name: Laptop Pro X15
description: High-performance laptop with Intel Core i9, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD. Perfect for professionals and power users. Features a stunning 15.6" 4K display with stunning color accuracy.

name: Smartphone Ultra S24
description: Latest flagship smartphone with 200MP camera, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 5000mAh battery, and 120Hz AMOLED display. Experience the future of mobile.

name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with industry-leading active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal-clear audio. Your sound, your world.

name: 4K Smart LED TV 55"
description: 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV with Dolby Vision, HDR10+, built-in Alexa, and a stunning slim bezel design. Transform your living room experience.

name: Smart Watch Series 9
description: Advanced health monitoring smartwatch with ECG, blood oxygen tracking, GPS, and a beautiful always-on Retina display. Stay connected, stay healthy.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches, ultra-fast 1ms response time, dedicated macro keys, and aircraft-grade aluminum frame for serious gamers.

name: Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: Ultra-precise gaming mouse with 25,000 DPI optical sensor, 70-hour battery, 11 programmable buttons, and customizable RGB lighting for the ultimate gaming experience.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof portable speaker with 360 degree surround sound, 24-hour playtime, built-in powerbank, and rugged design. Take your music everywhere.

name: DSLR Camera Kit
description: Professional DSLR camera with 24.2MP sensor, 4K video recording, dual card slots, and weather sealing. Comes with 18-55mm kit lens. Capture every moment perfectly.

name: iPad Pro 12.9"
description: The ultimate iPad experience with M2 chip, Liquid Retina XDR display, ProMotion 120Hz, Thunderbolt 4, and support for Apple Pencil 2. Creativity has no limits.

name: True Wireless Earbuds Pro
description: Premium TWS earbuds with adaptive ANC, spatial audio, transparency mode, 6+30hr battery, IPX4 water resistance, and custom-fit ear tips.

name: Gaming Console X Series
description: Next-generation gaming console with 12 teraflops of power, 1TB NVMe SSD, 4K gaming at 120fps, ray tracing, and backward compatibility. Game on.
